description:
Testing-review M2. The control-flow mutators (guard_drop, case_drop, else_removal) have the lightest edge coverage and are the most dangerous to get wrong (a wrong AST compiles but mutates the wrong branch -> silently mis-classified site).

- guard_drop: add multi-guard (when a when b), nested guards in case/anon-fn clauses, clause-selection-shift.
- else_removal: single-clause with (should NOT match), nested with.
- case_drop: add to the involution/round-trip property in mutators_property_test.exs (currently arith/compare/boolean only).

Files: test/mutagen_ex/mutators/{guard_drop,else_removal,case_drop}_test.exs; mutators_property_test.exs.

Done: each control-flow mutator unit suite covers the multi-clause/nested/single-clause forms; case_drop in the involution property.
title: M2: control-flow mutator edge cases + case_drop involution property
